label: Transparent horseshoe crab motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only one complete horseshoe crab shell motif for a Morphous design-system catalog, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A horseshoe crab viewed from a slightly elevated dorsal angle, complete bronze-brown domed carapace, subtle sand-gray worn edges, segmented tail spine visible but not exaggerated, small legs tucked beneath only if visible, accurate ancient marine anatomy, tactile shell scratches, matte wet-shell highlights, sea-foam pale edge reflections. It should feel like a real Limulus shell and a refined design-system source, not a cartoon.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the shell edge, tail spine, side spines, or silhouette. Single subject only.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves bronze shell, sand gray abrasion, sea foam highlights, shallow grooves, and ancient fossil-like shell texture.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no beach scene, no sand, no water, no second animal, no green screen, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection outside the shell.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: horizontal Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Create a STRICT HORIZONTAL 16:9 WIDESCREEN design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Horseshoe Crab". The canvas must be landscape, not portrait, with a wide dashboard-style layout spanning left to right.
Reference use: Use the visible isolated horseshoe crab motif as the source reference. Derive every color and texture from its bronze-brown domed shell, sand-gray worn rim, fossil-like grooves, shallow scratches, beach-worn carapace panels, and pale sea-foam edge reflections.
Canvas: exact landscape 16:9 widescreen, 3840 x 2160 px. Never rotate the board. Do not create a tall poster. Fill the wide frame with a top header and multiple horizontal columns.
Required visible sections with readable labels: Morphous Horseshoe Crab, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Layout: left navigation rail, top token header, central component matrix, right dashboard/data column, bottom strip for radius spacing shadows texture tokens. Use broad horizontal bands and large labels so the board reads when downscaled.
Typography: English UI samples and Japanese samples: カブトガニ, 沿岸データ, 古代シェル. Include Geist and Noto Sans JP style guidance. Use compact product UI typography, readable numerals, and quiet technical labels.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, tables, command search, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, charts, forms, empty/loading/error/success states, token swatches.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn product design-system source board, ancient coastal data system, 8px radii only, bronze shell primary actions, sand-gray surfaces, sea-foam focus rings, charcoal ink, fossil groove separators, tactile shell texture overlays, precise data-grid rhythm.
Palette labels: Tidal Sand, Shell Bronze, Worn Umber, Carapace Charcoal, Sand Grey, Sea Foam, Wet Shell Highlight, Fossil Line, Deep Tide.
Visual details: subtle horseshoe-crab shell arc geometry in panels, thin groove dividers, small side-spine tick marks as chart markers, restrained bronze/sand/sea-foam palette plus near-neutrals only.
Text: short readable UI labels only; avoid long paragraphs and tiny token tables.
Constraints: no portrait composition, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no one-note beige theme, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Horseshoe Crab", no illegible microtext, no radii larger than 8px.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: horizontal Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Create a STRICT HORIZONTAL 16:9 WIDESCREEN dark-mode companion design-system board for "Morphous Horseshoe Crab". It must feel like the same system as the visible light board translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible isolated horseshoe crab motif and the visible light-mode board as references. Preserve the same sections, component coverage, palette roles, 8px max radius, ancient coastal data-system tone, bronze shell actions, sand-gray neutral structure, sea-foam focus rings, fossil groove texture, Japanese typography, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, spacing, radius, and shadows.
Canvas: exact landscape 16:9 widescreen, 3840 x 2160 px. Never create a portrait or tall poster. Fill the wide frame with a top header and multiple horizontal UI columns.
Required visible sections with readable labels: Morphous Horseshoe Crab, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Dark palette direction: deep tide charcoal background, dark wet-shell panels, bronze primary actions, worn umber secondary controls, sand-gray dividers, sea-foam focus and success states, pale tidal-sand text, fossil-line borders, shell-highlight surfaces. Use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif.
Typography: English UI samples and Japanese samples: カブトガニ, 沿岸データ, 古代シェル. Include Geist and Noto Sans JP style guidance. Use compact product UI typography, readable numerals, and quiet technical labels.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn dark buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, metric cards, charts, forms, empty/loading/error/success states, token swatches.
Style: premium dark product design-system source board, ancient coastal data console, 8px radii only, thin fossil-groove dividers, tactile shell texture overlays, shell-arc panels, side-spine tick marks as chart markers, crisp data-grid rhythm, restrained contrast but not flat black.
Palette labels: Tidal Sand, Shell Bronze, Worn Umber, Carapace Charcoal, Sand Grey, Sea Foam, Wet Shell Highlight, Fossil Line, Deep Tide.
Text: short readable UI labels only; avoid long paragraphs and tiny token tables.
Constraints: no portrait composition, no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no one-note dark slate theme, no flat pure-black background only, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Horseshoe Crab", no illegible microtext, no radii larger than 8px.
